title: orchis tridentata subsp. conica
intro: Orchis tridentata subsp. conica is a subspecies of the Orchis tridentata plant, commonly known as the slender tongued orchid, which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Orchis tridentata subsp. conica include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and its active compounds, such as iridoid glycosides, can be extracted and used in pharmaceuticals or dietary supplements.
